ticket.title: Login button is unresponsive on Safari iOS
ticket.description: When tapping the login button on iPhone Safari, nothing happens. Other browsers work. Repro: open the app on iOS 17 Safari, tap login.

recordedFinalText:
{"files":[{"path":"proposal.md","content":"# Fix iOS Safari login button

The login button does not fire its onClick handler on iOS Safari due to a passive touch listener interaction. Switch to non-passive touchend handler."},{"path":"tasks.md","content":"- [ ] Reproduce in iOS Safari simulator
- [ ] Replace passive listener with touchend handler
- [ ] Add regression test"}],"openQuestions":[],"assumptions":["Issue is reproducible in iOS Safari 17 simulator"],"risks":["Touchend may not fire if upstream handler calls preventDefault"]}
